The '''Tower of Law''' was a governmental building on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]].

==History==
Established at a crossroads circa [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]], the Tower of Law was surrounded by a massive marketplace and frequented by [[Bimm/Legends|both races]] of [[Bimm (furred species)/Legends|Bimm]]. A modest building constructed of white stone with horizontal black markings, the Tower was the meeting place of the [[Law Elders]] of [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]], the planet's main governing body. Within the tower the walls were covered by large tapestries, and the top level was home to a small museum which held relics from the [[middle era of the Old Republic]]. A [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] delegation led by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] met at the Tower of Law in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] to discuss the planet's admittance into the Republic.<ref name="HTTE" />
